title: Empowered Armaments
description: Empowered Armaments is a mod designed to enhance the gameplay experience with basic Minecraft weapons
body:
![logo_empowered_armaments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/537889941f60475b733fc0bf8a48565e5772c86f.jpeg) # EMPOWERED ARMAMENTS Empowered Armaments is a mod designed to enhance the gameplay experience with basic Minecraft weapons, such as swords and axes. This mod allows players to upgrade and improve vanilla weapons, adding a new level of power and functionality to make them more effective in combat. With Empowered Armaments, players can explore new crafting recipes and use advanced materials to enhance their weapons, increasing their damage and speed stats. It is an ideal add-on for those looking to take their adventures to the next level while maintaining the classic Minecraft style. ### Key Features: - Upgrades for swords. - New crafting recipes. - Additional levels of enhancement and customization. ### Available Recipes: - Reinforced wooden sword
![madera_reforzada](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/95b8c00c-3b46-450e-96a3-d330c5da4666)

- Reinforced stone sword

### New characteristics of reinforced weapons: - Reinforced wooden sword: **6 Attack Damage, 2 Attack Speed** - Reinforced stone sword: **8 Attack Damage, 2 Attack Speed** - Reinforced iron sword: **11 Attack Damage, 2 Attack Speed** - Reinforced diamond sword: **14 Attack Damage, 2 Attack Speed**
